data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of the northeast monsoon associated with the cold front, the weather will become cool over Guangdong in the next couple of days. An upper-air disturbance will also bring rainy weather to the region. Under the influence of a relatively dry replenishment of the monsoon, the weather will improve gradually over southern China in the latter part of this week and over the weekend.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260303","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"North to northeast force 4 to 5.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with occasional showers and isolated thunderstorms.
